freddy fazbear.name: Freddy Fazbear
freddy fazbear.description: The main mascot of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. A brown bear animatronic wearing a top hat and bow tie.
freddy fazbear.behavior: Moves slowly but becomes more active as the nights progress. Watches from the show stage and sneaks through the halls. His laugh signals he is near.

bonnie.name: Bonnie the Bunny
bonnie.description: A purple/blue rabbit animatronic who plays guitar on stage. One of the most active animatronics on Night 1.
bonnie.behavior: Very aggressive from the start. Approaches from the left side and can appear in the doorway with little warning.

chica.name: Chica the Chicken
chica.description: A yellow chicken animatronic who carries a cupcake named Mr. Cupcake. She approaches from the right side.
chica.behavior: Active from early nights. She goes through the kitchen before approaching the right door. Her sounds in the kitchen are a warning.

foxy.name: Foxy the Pirate
foxy.description: A damaged red fox animatronic who hides behind the curtain in Pirate Cove. He sprints down the left hallway.
foxy.behavior: Must be monitored via camera. If ignored too long he dashes to the office. Closing the door stops him — but wastes power.

golden freddy.name: Golden Freddy
golden freddy.description: A mysterious golden version of Freddy. Rarely seen — appears as a hallucination in the office.
golden freddy.behavior: Staring at him causes the game to crash. Looking away with the monitor makes him vanish. His origins remain unknown.

toy freddy.name: Toy Freddy
toy freddy.description: An updated version of Freddy with rosy cheeks and a wide smile. Designed to appeal to children.
toy freddy.behavior: Becomes active on later nights. Follows the standard vents path and must be warded off with the Freddy mask.

toy bonnie.name: Toy Bonnie
toy bonnie.description: A redesigned Bonnie with a sleek blue appearance, green eyes, and a cheery smile.
toy bonnie.behavior: One of the most active animatronics from Night 1. He crawls through the vents and appears in the right air vent.

toy chica.name: Toy Chica
toy chica.description: A redesigned Chica with a more human-like appearance. Her beak detaches as she becomes more aggressive.
toy chica.behavior: Approaches through the left vent. Her beak disappearing on the stage camera indicates she's on the move.

mangle.name: Mangle
mangle.description: A heavily damaged Foxy animatronic with a tangled, disassembled appearance. Gender ambiguous.
mangle.behavior: Crawls through the ceiling vents. Her radio static sound signals she is in the office — check the ceiling.

balloon boy.name: Balloon Boy
balloon boy.description: A small human-like animatronic holding a balloon and sign. Considered the most annoying animatronic.
balloon boy.behavior: Enters through the left vent and disables your flashlight if he reaches the office. Cannot jumpscare you but enables others.

the puppet.name: The Puppet
the puppet.description: A tall marionette animatronic with a white face and black body. Contained in the Prize Corner music box.
the puppet.behavior: Must be kept in the box by winding the music box via the Prize Corner camera. If the music stops, it's too late.

withered freddy.name: Withered Freddy
withered freddy.description: A deteriorated older model of Freddy with a broken, exposed endoskeleton. Kept in the Parts & Service room.
withered freddy.behavior: Becomes active from Night 2. Must be warded off with the Freddy Fazbear mask when he appears in the hallway.

withered bonnie.name: Withered Bonnie
withered bonnie.description: A heavily damaged older Bonnie with his face completely missing, revealing the endoskeleton beneath.
withered bonnie.behavior: One of the most aggressive withered animatronics. Appears in the left air vent and requires quick mask use.

withered chica.name: Withered Chica
withered chica.description: A damaged older Chica with a wider jaw, exposed wiring, and missing suit sections.
withered chica.behavior: Approaches through the right air vent. The mask must be worn quickly when she appears at the end of the vent.

withered foxy.name: Withered Foxy
withered foxy.description: A heavily deteriorated version of Foxy with tears in his suit and a more menacing frame.
withered foxy.behavior: Rushes the office from the left hallway. The mask must be worn while he stands in the office or he will attack.

shadow bonnie.name: Shadow Bonnie (RWQFSFASXC)
shadow bonnie.description: A shadowy black version of Toy Bonnie with glowing white eyes. Extremely rare and mysterious.
shadow bonnie.behavior: Appears randomly in the office. Staring at him too long causes the game to crash, similar to Golden Freddy.

springtrap.name: Springtrap
springtrap.description: A decayed Spring Bonnie suit containing the rotting corpse of William Afton. The only true animatronic in FNAF 3.
springtrap.behavior: Highly intelligent. Lured by audio and ventilation sounds. Sealing vents temporarily slows him but resets must be managed.

phantom freddy.name: Phantom Freddy
phantom freddy.description: A charred, ghostly version of Freddy that appears as a hallucination in the office.
phantom freddy.behavior: Walks slowly across the office. Looking away before he fully appears prevents the jumpscare. A distraction from Springtrap.

phantom chica.name: Phantom Chica
phantom chica.description: A burnt phantom version of Chica that appears on the arcade game camera.
phantom chica.behavior: Appears when viewing the arcade monitor too long. Looking away before she lunges prevents the jumpscare.

phantom foxy.name: Phantom Foxy
phantom foxy.description: A charred hallucination of Foxy that crouches in the corner of the office.
phantom foxy.behavior: Appears in the corner of the maintenance panel. Clicking the panel without noticing him triggers the jumpscare.

phantom mangle.name: Phantom Mangle
phantom mangle.description: A burnt hallucination of Mangle that hangs from the ceiling of the office emitting radio static.
phantom mangle.behavior: Appears suddenly in the office. Her static disables the ventilation system if she is not dealt with in time.

phantom puppet.name: Phantom Puppet
phantom puppet.description: A dark, burnt version of The Puppet that appears when looking at a specific camera too long.
phantom puppet.behavior: Covers the player's view with her face. Blocks all interaction until the timer resets the scene.

phantom bb.name: Phantom Balloon Boy
phantom bb.description: A burnt, distorted hallucination of Balloon Boy with hollow black eyes.
phantom bb.behavior: Appears in the left window. Staring at him too long triggers a jumpscare and disables the ventilation.

nightmare freddy.name: Nightmare Freddy
nightmare freddy.description: A terrifying nightmare version of Freddy covered in sharp teeth and claws. Three mini Freddys called Freddles cling to him.
nightmare freddy.behavior: Freddles appear on the bed — if ignored, Nightmare Freddy materializes and attacks. Check the bed frequently.

nightmare bonnie.name: Nightmare Bonnie
nightmare bonnie.description: A massive, shadowy nightmare version of Bonnie with enormous teeth and glowing eyes.
nightmare bonnie.behavior: Approaches from the left door. A blinking eye or deep breathing outside the door means he is waiting. Shut the door immediately.

nightmare chica.name: Nightmare Chica
nightmare chica.description: A horrifying nightmare Chica with a massive beak full of sharp teeth and razor claws.
nightmare chica.behavior: Approaches from the right door. Her cupcake — Jack-O-Chica — is its own threat and can jumpscare independently.

nightmare foxy.name: Nightmare Foxy
nightmare foxy.description: A terrifying version of Foxy with a gaping jaw and tattered appearance. Hides in the closet.
nightmare foxy.behavior: Lurks in the closet. Keep checking and closing the closet or he will jump out. He can also approach from the hallways.

nightmare fredbear.name: Nightmare Fredbear
nightmare fredbear.description: The golden nightmare — the most terrifying animatronic in FNAF 4. Represents the bite of '87.
nightmare fredbear.behavior: Appears on Night 5 and 6. Extremely aggressive. Can attack from any direction and rarely gives audio warnings.

nightmare.name: Nightmare
nightmare.description: A pitch-black version of Nightmare Fredbear with white eyes and teeth. The final form of the nightmare.
nightmare.behavior: Replaces Nightmare Fredbear on Night 7 (20/20/20/20 mode). Identical behavior but darker and more terrifying.

plushtrap.name: Plushtrap
plushtrap.description: A small, cartoonish plush version of Springtrap. Stars in the 'Fun with Plushtrap' minigame.
plushtrap.behavior: Must be stopped exactly on the X mark in the hallway using the flashlight. Too slow or too fast — he jumpscares you.

nightmarionne.name: Nightmarionne
nightmarionne.description: A nightmare version of The Puppet — a tall, shadowy marionette with a haunting grin.
nightmarionne.behavior: Appears in the Halloween edition of FNAF 4. Can appear at any location and must be responded to immediately.

circus baby.name: Circus Baby
circus baby.description: A tall, red-haired female animatronic with a clown aesthetic. The leader of the Funtime animatronics.
circus baby.behavior: Guides the player through the facility while secretly harboring a dark agenda. She contains the soul of Elizabeth Afton.

funtime freddy.name: Funtime Freddy
funtime freddy.description: A white and purple Freddy with a smaller animatronic called Bon-Bon on his right hand.
funtime freddy.behavior: Found in the Breaker Room. Must be kept in check using the hand unit. Bon-Bon can detach and act independently.

funtime foxy.name: Funtime Foxy
funtime foxy.description: A white and pink fox animatronic in the Funtime Auditorium. Moves in complete darkness.
funtime foxy.behavior: Cannot be seen directly. The player must navigate the auditorium using a controlled flash. Looking too long triggers an attack.

ballora.name: Ballora
ballora.description: A ballerina animatronic with her eyes almost always closed. Graceful yet deeply unsettling.
ballora.behavior: Located in Ballora Gallery. Approaches when the player makes noise. Her music grows louder as she gets closer.

ennard.name: Ennard
ennard.description: A twisted amalgamation of all the Funtime animatronics' endoskeletons, controlled by Circus Baby.
ennard.behavior: Appears in the private room on the final night. Must be shocked repeatedly to keep him away until 6AM.

scraptrap.name: Scraptrap
scraptrap.description: William Afton again, this time torn free from the Spring Bonnie suit and barely held together.
scraptrap.behavior: Lured into the pizzeria by audio lures. Extremely persistent — he always comes back no matter how many times he is driven away.

scrap baby.name: Scrap Baby
scrap baby.description: A heavily modified and scarred version of Circus Baby, rejected by Ennard and rebuilt with salvaged parts.
scrap baby.behavior: Comes through the left side. Uses her arm claw as a weapon. Audio lures redirect her away from the office.

molten freddy.name: Molten Freddy
molten freddy.description: The remains of Ennard after Baby was expelled — a melted tangle of wires and endoskeleton parts.
molten freddy.behavior: Approaches from the right. Very fast and unpredictable. Requires quick use of audio lures to keep him at bay.

lefty.name: Lefty
lefty.description: A mysterious black bear animatronic. A puppet is stored inside him — The Puppet's soul is being contained.
lefty.behavior: Triggered by noise, heat, and activity. Very sensitive — keeping the environment calm is essential to slow him down.

glitchtrap.name: Glitchtrap
glitchtrap.description: A digital manifestation of William Afton trapped inside the FNAF VR game. Appears as a friendly Spring Bonnie costume.
glitchtrap.behavior: Does not jumpscare directly — instead he manipulates and merges with the player. Collecting all tapes is how he spreads.

glamrock freddy.name: Glamrock Freddy
glamrock freddy.description: A rock star version of Freddy with a blue color scheme. He is the player's ally throughout Security Breach.
glamrock freddy.behavior: Protective of Gregory. He carries Gregory in his chest cavity and helps him navigate the Mega Pizza Plex.

glamrock chica.name: Glamrock Chica
glamrock chica.description: A rock star Chica with a yellow and white look, wearing a leather jacket. Loves pizza and performing.
glamrock chica.behavior: Actively hunts Gregory. Upgraded versions become faster and more aggressive. Trash and the Gang sidequest involves her.

roxanne wolf.name: Roxanne Wolf
roxanne wolf.description: A green wolf animatronic with silver hair and a rock star attitude. Extremely competitive and vain.
roxanne wolf.behavior: Fastest animatronic in Security Breach. Can detect Gregory nearby. Removing her eyes slows her down significantly.

montgomery gator.name: Montgomery Gator
montgomery gator.description: A purple alligator animatronic with sunglasses and a bass guitar. Known for his aggressive personality.
montgomery gator.behavior: Guards the Monty Golf area. Can break through barriers. Removing his claws weakens him.

vanny.name: Vanny
vanny.description: A mysterious human in a white bunny costume. A follower of Glitchtrap/William Afton.
vanny.behavior: Stalks Gregory throughout the Mega Pizza Plex. Appears at high alert levels. Her true identity is hidden behind the mask.

sun moon.name: Sun / Moon (Daycare Attendant)
sun moon.description: A jester-like animatronic with two personalities: Sun (friendly in light) and Moon (hostile in darkness).
sun moon.behavior: Sun is playful and kind. When the lights go out Moon takes over — aggressive and relentless until power is restored.
